// encrypted transmission — origin unknown

ACCESS LOCKED

We've sealed this channel. If you really want him back, you'll know the key.

// incoming transmission — origin unknown

LAST KNOWN LOCATION

Listen carefully, Oats. We have Nura. He's somewhere you both know — but you'll have to earn your way to him.

Six trials stand between you and his location. Clear each one and we'll release pieces of a 13-letter passphrase. Assemble it in the vault, and the door opens.

No real penalty for wrong answers. Unlimited tries, hints on every trial. We're cruel, not unfair.

CASE FILE

THE TRIALS

⌖ 18·06 0/6 cleared · 0/13 fragments

Tap an unlocked trial to enter it. Earn all 13 fragments, then crack the vault to find Nura.

TRIAL 01

PROOF OF LIFE

✕ back to case
// they sent a note to prove he's alive — but scrambled it

DECODE THE RANSOM NOTE

Every letter was rolled forward by the same amount. Turn the wheel to roll it back until the message reads true.

INTERCEPTED
0
DECODED
// proof of life confirmed

That's his handwriting alright — the note reads true. Take it to the board.

ONE MEMORY

VAULT

THE PASSPHRASE

✕ back to case
// all 13 fragments recovered — assemble the key

SPELL IT OUT

Tap two tiles to swap them. Arrange the fragments into the passphrase — four words, 13 letters. Each tile locks green when it's in the right place.
